CustomField.description: The Appraised Fee Simple Lot Value from the most recent Appraisal with an Appraisal Type of Buyer's Purchase Loan (copies automatically).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Appraised Fee Simple Lot Value from the most recent Appraisal with an Appraisal Type of Buyer's Purchase Loan.
CustomField.label: Appraised Fee Simple Lot Value
